ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the tests were performed */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measure for the tests */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the data was recorded */,
  "cumulative_total" INTEGER /* Cumulative total number of tests performed up to that date */,
  "daily_total" INTEGER /* Number of tests performed on that day */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for the tests performed on that day */,
  "test_availability" TEXT /* Availability of tests (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source providing the data */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the test record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_source_url FOREIGN KEY ("source_url") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_units FOREIGN KEY ("units") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source providing the data */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., government, NGO, research) */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source (1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., tests performed) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily statistic record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test record for the day */,
  "daily_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests performed on that day */,
  "positivity_rate" REAL /* Positivity rate for the tests performed on that day */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases confirmed on that day */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on that day */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_statistics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health officer, data analyst, public user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES testing_data ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
